items.author: SugarLux

items.title: No longer free????
items.content: I’ve been using and loving this app for years. Now after recent update, it won’t let me do anything without a subscription. Still claims that you can use for free, so please fix this!!! Tried to contact and it said my email couldn’t be sent. Hoping they read these??
items.author: Lyssarosanna

items.title: Paying
items.content: I’m not paying to workout that is stupid
items.author: Mallorykras

items.title: Poor handling of informing people of their subscription and where to find out information about it
items.content:
Hi,

I subscribed to what I thought was a year plan for 39.99 and a 6 day trial. It did not let me know before the trail was over so I couldn’t cancel it. I was going to keep it but then discovered that it was 39.99 per month not 39.99 for the entire year. This was very misleading. When I tried to go into your app to see my subscription detail I could not find it any where. 

I would like a refund of the money that was taken out of my account. And I have already cancelled my subscription
items.author: K3kio

items.title: Perfect for in your 50’s
items.content: This is a great workout especially for women in their 50’s .
items.author: JenBro27

items.title: I cannot log into app
items.content: I paid for a year membership and I cannot log into the account because it says it does not exist. I’ve tried to message the company and it says my message seems like spam and my inquiry won’t be submitted. I’ve tried multiple ways to submit to bypass this with no luck. There is no way to contact them otherwise and now I have 8 months that’s I paid for left that I do not have access to and all I want is to be able to access the app. So now what…
items.author: No customer supporttt

items.title: Full Body Slim
items.content: Great App
items.author: NannaAy

items.title: capitalism ruined it
items.content: i used this app back in 2023 to lose weight i downloaded it back in 2026 EVERYTHING requires money , everything is behind a paywall.. why make a app free if you’re gonna do mini in-app purchases for everything.
items.author: pinkbarbwire

items.title: Crazy
items.content: It really doesn’t work
items.author: 67 ff

items.title: Deleted after years of use
items.content: I used to LOVE this app. It allowed me to access work outs on my own time, in my own way. It was free forever, then recently required 90sec ads to do workouts, which was fine. All of a sudden I couldn’t access anything without paying an outrageous price. Apparently for them, money is more important than helping all people now. Used to be great, now is not at all.
items.author: Kv223

items.title: The SHEIN ads are out of control
items.content: While you’re working out, the app will close and the Shein website will open and this will happen multiple times without you prompting or touching your phone
items.author: Walet P.

items.title: Great workouts
items.content: I’m just starting and they have all types of exercises and all types of levels so u choose the one that’s best for you
items.author: ahcj k

items.title: Free trial wasn’t free
items.content: I wanted to try the free trial, I was told in app that there would be no charge until the end of the free trial and you guys immediately charged me! Now there is just a charge pending and I can’t pay for it. I’d like the trial to be cancelled so I don’t get charged the 39.99! I’m broke as hell and this is just ruining my experience. I used to use this app for free all the time and now suddenly I HAVE to pay or use a free trial? This is very disheartening. Please cancel my trial and cancel the payment so I don’t get charged. Thanks. Also wanted to just contact support for this but kept getting flagged as “spam” so yeah.
items.author: squishymallow

items.title: Updates
items.content: I’ve had this app for over five years now and I’ve loved them, but hate how they kept going from completely free to charging for everything now. Really great app but not paying for it.
items.author: Alex Symone

items.title: Cost
items.content: I get it life is not easy you have to pay for stuff but really? Why does it have to cost money I want a workout im under 18 no job how do I pay? Still the question were understandable seemed like it was really gonna help

items.title: Very good!
items.content: A very good app for motivation and everything, it’s fun to do for me at least, I love the warm ups and cool downs and demonstrations. Worth the money really.
items.author: Nova700

items.title: Started great, then locked up
items.content: The app allows you to access almost everything at the start, and then begins to restrict. I’ve had the app for over a year now and I am unable to do anything at all. I cannot do saved workouts or any other plan that I used to be able to access after watching over a minute of ads.
